name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-bisection
description: E5 Phase 7d Step 7 — bisection fallback enabled (along with D2 cubic, since bisection only fires when cubic returns no in-range root). Sets toggles BEFORE prebuild so the FIRST pipeline is built with both BISECTION_ENABLED and D2_CUBIC_ENABLED. tileCount=8 for maximum per-tile budget headroom — bisection is heaviest of the per-overshoot features (6 sceneSDF calls per fire). Currently expected to CRASH on iGPU; parked as a regression gate for the eventual fix path (S5 lower res, S2 deeper tiling, or bigger GPU).
